channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Deepfake porn is a labor issue
item.description: Last month, First Lady Melania Trump used her first public remarks of President Trump’s second term to voice her support for the Take It Down Act, a bipartisan bill aimed at curbing deepfake “revenge porn.” She was joined by Elliston Berry, a Texas teenager who was a victim of deepfake porn.
item.dc:creator: Hannah Wohl, Fast Company

item.title: Former Facebook executive tells Senate committee company undermined US national security with China
item.description: Sarah Wynn-Williams, a former executive at Meta and author of an explosive insider account of her time at the social media giant, testified before the Senate Judiciary Committee Wednesday, accusing the company of undermining national security and briefing China on U.S.
item.dc:creator: Barbara Ortutay, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: New hands-on lab makes it easy to explore cloud configurations and workload migrations
item.description: For those that attended VMware Explore in Las Vegas and Barcelona, there was a new self-paced hands-on lab released exclusively for the attendees to experience Google Cloud VMware Engine while at the events.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Increase flexibility and enable a cyber-resilient IT infrastructure
item.description: Broadcom and Google Cloud’s continued commitment to solving our customers’ most pressing challenges stems from our joint goal to enable every organization’s ability to digitally transform through data-powered innovation with the highly secure and cyber-resilient infrastructure, platform, industry so
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Achieve greater business value with VMware Cloud Foundation on Google Cloud VMware Engine
item.description: VMware Cloud Foundation on Google Cloud VMware Engine (GCVE) is now generally available, and there has never been a better time to move your VMware workloads to Google Cloud, so you can bring down your costs and benefit from a modern cloud experience.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: How cloud adoption solves some of IT’s biggest headaches
item.description: In an era when artificial intelligence (AI) and other resource-intensive technologies demand unprecedented computing power, data centers are starting to buckle, and CIOs are feeling the budget pressure.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: No refactoring required: A painless path to cloud adoption
item.description: Cloud computing has been a major force in enterprise technology for two decades. But according to a Barclays report issued last year, only 42% of workloads reside in the public cloud, despite the benefits of running workloads in the cloud.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Canon reportedly U-turns on price drops for two of its most popular cameras – and it could be the tip of the tariffs iceberg
item.description: Canon has reportedly canceled some planned price cuts for two of its most affordable cameras. Here's why it could be just the start of an expensive year for photographers.
item.dc:creator: mark.wilson@futurenet.com (Mark Wilson), TechRadar

item.title: Agentic AI – Ongoing coverage of its impact on the enterprise
item.description: Over the next few years, agentic AI is expected to bring not only rapid technological breakthroughs, but a societal transformation, redefining how we live, work and interact with the world. And this shift is happening quickly.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Tailscale secures $160 million for its WireGuard-based VPN development
item.description: Virtual private network (VPN) technology has been a cornerstone of the networking landscape for decades, beginning first with the IPsec protocol then getting a bit easier with SSL-VPN technology. But little has changed with the technology.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Fox News AI Newsletter: The dangers of oversharing with AI tools
item.description: Stay up to date on the latest AI technology advancements and learn about the challenges and opportunities AI presents now and for the future.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Samsung reveals US OLED TV prices, and surprise, surprise, it undercuts LG's prices
item.description: Samsung has revealed US pricing for its 2025 OLED TV lineup, and the prices are cheaper than LG's OLEDs.
item.dc:creator: james.davidson@futurenet.com (James Davidson), TechRadar

item.title: Is the YouTube TV app missing from your Roku? You're not alone, here's how to fix it
item.description: Roku owners have noticed that the YouTube TV app has randomly vanished from their devices. Here's how people have been fixing the issue.
item.dc:creator: rowan.davies@futurenet.com (Rowan Davies), TechRadar

item.title: Ignoring Wall Street, Apple gets busy on Vision Pro 2.0
item.description: While politicians everywhere seem to be doing their best to make everything pretty difficult, the North Star for Apple remains what it always has been: creating products people seem to love. That’s what got the company through (and out of) tough times before.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: New AI Features Announced at Google Cloud Next Event
item.description: Google announces new AI features, including on-demand generative AI analyst for spreadsheets and workflow automation tool, at Cloud Next event.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Five things to consider before you deploy an LLM
item.description: If the screwdriver were invented by the tech industry today, then it would be widely deployed for a variety of tasks, including hammering nails. Since the debut of ChatGPT, there has been growing fervor and backlash against large language models (LLMs).
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: NetBox Labs embraces intersection of network management and AI
item.description: Over the last several years, NetBox has established itself as a widely used open-source tool for understanding and modeling networks. NetBox Labs, the lead commercial sponsor behind the open-source project, has continued to push ahead and expand beyond just the core NetBox project.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: AI vs. pro gambler's $1 million March Madness bet coming down to Duke and Houston
item.description: SAN ANTONIO (AP) — The $1 million March Madness wager between a pro gambler and an artificial-intelligence site will be decided by the winner of the Duke-Houston game in the Final Four. The Vegas bookies project the gambler, who picked 5 1/2-point favorite Duke, should win.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: DHS plans to slash HQ workforce, including AI experts
item.description: DHS is planning sweeping workforce cuts across its Management Directorate, with targets including the AI Corps and the CX Directorate. The post DHS plans to slash HQ workforce, including AI experts first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: Microsoft founder Bill Gates reflects upon a 50-year-old computer code that reshaped technology
item.description: Even as he grows older, Microsoft founder Bill Gates still fondly remembers the catalytic computer code he wrote 50 years ago that opened up a new frontier in technology.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL LIEDTKE, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: A behind-the-scenes look at Nintendo Switch 2
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Nintendo's Switch 2 is bigger and better than its predecessor of eight years past as the video game developer pushes to bring its brand into “a new era" where social experiences are at the forefront.
item.dc:creator: RYAN KRYSKA, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: Relentless hackers abandon Windows to target your Apple ID
item.description: Experts say hackers who used to focus on Windows operating systems are increasingly targeting Apple IDs as part of a new phishing campaign.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
